decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Investigated Mission_Airstrike turn 4 status desync before selecting next mission. Root cause: simulator kept IceMech and its tile on fire after Cryo-Launcher self-freeze from a burning tile; live game extinguished both. Patched Rust self-freeze tile cleanup, bumped SIMULATOR_VERSION 230->231, archived failure_db_snapshot_sim_v230, rebuilt/installed wheel, focused Rust test passed, focused replay proof now predicts fire cleared. Broad regression was attempted with a clean target but stopped after several minutes during Rust corpus to keep live run moving.

decisions.label: note
decisions.message: Next accessible frontier after Mission_Airstrike appears to be Safeguard Valley / Mission_Dam with Destroy the Dam and Block Vek Spawning 3 times. Mission picker scores block-spawn/mite-style objectives poorly for perfect-island farming, but active target is Distant Friends and this red frontier has mountain/dam terrain; accept spawn-block bonus as secondary if needed to preserve timeline and scan for the strange marker.
